steps.title: Trace the passage's movement
steps.content: The text begins with Adeyemi's debut novel, then places that work in the longer tradition of Afrofuturism. It ends by describing important qualities of that tradition, including speculation about alternate pasts and meditations on authority.

steps.title: Reject added structures
steps.content: A invents political event analysis. B claims the passage distinguishes Adeyemi from superficially similar writers, which it does not. D says the passage summarizes the book and compares it to more widely read works; those elements are absent. The answer is C.
